mouthwash.description: Core product category. Dual-chamber activated system. All mouthwashes use zinc ion technology.

products.name: SmartMouth™ Original Activated Mouthwash
products.keyBenefit: Baseline 24-hour fresh breath, eliminates VSCs

products.name: SmartMouth™ Clinical DDS Oral Rinse
products.keyBenefit: Prescription-strength. Outperformed chlorhexidine in clinical trials for staining, taste, and patient compliance.
highlights: Outperformed chlorhexidine (study: Oral Health and Preventive Dentistry)

products.name: SmartMouth™ Dry Mouth Activated Mouthwash
products.keyBenefit: Eliminates bad breath + relieves dry mouth symptoms
products.targetCondition: Dry mouth (xerostomia) — often caused by medications, aging, or medical conditions

products.name: SmartMouth™ Mouth Sore Activated Mouthwash
products.keyBenefit: Fresh breath + mouth sore healing support
products.targetCondition: Canker sores, post-procedure healing, chemotherapy patients

products.name: SmartMouth™ Gum Health Activated Mouthwash
products.keyBenefit: Fresh breath + gum health support (anti-inflammatory aloe)
products.targetCondition: Gingivitis, bleeding gums, early gum disease

products.name: SmartMouth™ Advanced Liposomal Vitamin C Mouthwash
products.keyBenefit: Fresh breath + Vitamin C gum support via liposomal technology

products.name: SmartMouth™ Advanced Liposomal Morning Mouthwash
products.keyBenefit: Fresh start to the day — morning-specific zinc ion activation

products.name: SmartMouth™ Advanced Liposomal Evening Mouthwash
products.keyBenefit: Overnight protection — extends fresh breath through sleep
